focus_node: Check 14 structural requirements — lint.sh heredoc JSON escaping bug

dead_ends.approach: bash heredoc interpolation of multi-line JSON array from STRUCTURAL_VIOLATOR_JSON
dead_ends.reason: When STRUCTURAL_VIOLATOR_JSON contains raw JSON array (40 items, ~8KB), embedding it directly in the cat <<EOF heredoc breaks outer JSON — inner quotes and newlines create invalid JSON at line 226: trailing comma before end of object. Tried escaping with json.dumps() but bash still interpolates unescaped.
dead_ends.fixed_in: scripts/lint.sh: removed trailing comma after ${STRUCTURAL_VIOLATOR_JSON} in heredoc
dead_ends.note: check-structural.sh works correctly (valid JSON). Problem is only in lint.sh heredoc output formatting.

query_summary.intent: Integrate Check 14: structural requirements validation into lint.sh
key_findings: check-structural.sh correctly finds 40 violations across wiki pages (all missing body text between H1 and first ##)
lint.sh now runs 14 checks instead of 13
Bug: STRUCTURAL_VIOLATOR_JSON array breaks JSON output in heredoc — outer JSON invalid
Fixed: trailing comma bug in lint.sh Check 14 heredoc — now valid JSON output

next_steps_todo.task: Fix lint.sh Check 14: escape STRUCTURAL_VIOLATOR_JSON properly for heredoc (use jq or double-escape inner quotes)
Add aliases to all entity/concept pages for discoverability
